overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through grassy highlands at night. The character approaches and passes a spectral figure and ancient stone ruins while navigating the moonlit natural landscape.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the spectral figure with weapons on back

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a moonlit dirt path through open grasslands. A spectral figure stands motionless in the distance ahead, glowing white against the dark blue night. Tall grass surrounds the path with scattered trees visible on both sides.

events.description: passing the spectral figure and approaching stone tower ruins on the left
walking alongside the moss-covered stone tower ruin

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path past the spectral figure and alongside ancient stone ruins

entered.detail: ancient stone tower ruins covered in moss and vegetation
rocky hillside formation visible in the distance
weathered wooden posts lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves left past the spectral figure, revealing ancient stone tower ruins on the left side. Geralt walks alongside the moss-covered stone structure as wooden fence posts appear on the right. The terrain remains open with grassy hills extending into the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside trail with rocky outcrops

events.description: path curves right ascending the hillside

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along the winding path through open grassland with rocky terrain

entered.detail: grassy hillside sloping upward on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path ascends a grassy hillside, leaving the stone ruins behind. Rocky outcrops become prominent on the right side as the trail winds upward. The terrain opens up with gentle slopes covered in tall grass under the starry night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed trail with dense vegetation and boulders

events.description: path becomes more enclosed with dense vegetation and large rocks

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding path through denser vegetation and rocky terrain

entered.detail: thick bushes and tall grass lining the left side of the path
prominent moss-covered boulders on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes more enclosed as dense vegetation closes in on the left and large moss-covered boulders appear on the right. The path continues winding through this rockier, more vegetated section of the highlands, with the terrain feeling more rugged and confined.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit highland path that evolves from open grasslands into a rugged, enclosed terrain. It begins with Geralt walking through wide fields of tall grass toward a glowing white spectral figure standing motionless in the distance. As the path curves left past the spirit, the scene opens up to reveal moss-covered stone tower ruins and wooden fence posts lining the trail. The camera then follows the path as it ascends a grassy hillside, leaving the ruins behind and passing prominent rocky outcrops under a starry night sky. Finally, the landscape shifts from open slopes to a more confined environment as dense vegetation closes in on the left and large moss-covered boulders crowd the right side of the winding trail.
